tool.name: MGnify: Generate ASV abundance and Krona tables
tool.description: Create ASV read count tables and Krona-compatible taxonomy abundance files

param.name: map_file
param.label: DADA2 ASV map file
param.help: Mapping file linking reads to inferred ASV identifiers

param.name: taxa
param.label: ASV taxonomy table
param.help: Taxonomy table produced by the MAPseq-to-ASV-table tool

param.name: amp
param.label: Amplicon region reads
param.help: List of read identifiers belonging to the extracted amplicon region

param.name: headers
param.label: FASTQ headers
param.help: FASTQ header identifiers corresponding to the input reads

tool.help:
**Generate ASV Count Tables** ----------------------------- This tool generates **ASV abundance tables** from DADA2 inference outputs and taxonomy assignments.
It combines:
- ASV-to-read mappings produced during **DADA2 inference** - taxonomic classifications for each ASV - read metadata from FASTQ headers
to produce read count tables suitable for downstream microbiome analysis and visualization.
